business.name: Bloom Aesthetics Clinic
business.tagline: Enhancing natural beauty with expert care

hours.bank_holidays: Closed — please check our website for updated schedules

services.name: Botox (Anti-Wrinkle Injections)
services.description: Botulinum toxin injections to reduce the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles. Typical treatment areas include forehead, frown lines, and crow's feet.
services.results_timeline: Results visible within 3–7 days, full effect at 2 weeks
services.downtime: Minimal — most patients return to normal activities immediately

services.name: Dermal Fillers
services.description: Hyaluronic acid-based fillers for lip enhancement, cheek augmentation, nasolabial folds, and jawline contouring.
services.results_timeline: Immediate results with final results after swelling subsides (1–2 weeks)
services.longevity: Typically lasts 6–12 months depending on area and product used
services.downtime: Mild swelling and bruising possible for 2–5 days

services.name: Initial Consultation
services.description: A complimentary face-to-face consultation with one of our experienced practitioners to discuss your goals, assess suitability, and create a personalised treatment plan.
services.note: No obligation to proceed with treatment after consultation

booking.cancellation_policy: We require a minimum of 24 hours' notice for cancellations or rescheduling. Late cancellations or no-shows may be subject to a £50 fee.
booking.deposit: No deposit required for consultations. A £50 deposit may be required for treatment bookings, deducted from your treatment cost.
booking.waiting_list: If your preferred slot is unavailable, we can add you to our cancellation waiting list.

policies.age_requirement: All patients must be 18 years or older.
policies.consultation_first: A consultation is required before any first-time treatment to ensure suitability and safety.
policies.patch_test: Patch tests may be required for certain treatments; your practitioner will advise during your consultation.
policies.medical_disclaimer: All treatments are carried out by qualified, insured practitioners. Individual results may vary. We do not provide medical diagnoses or advice — please consult your GP for medical concerns.
policies.payment_methods: We accept cash, debit card, credit card, and bank transfer. Payment is due at the time of treatment.
policies.refund_policy: Due to the nature of aesthetic treatments, refunds are not offered once a treatment has been administered. If you are unhappy with your results, please contact us to arrange a complimentary review appointment.

triggers: Customer complaint or expression of dissatisfaction
Medical question requiring clinical judgment (e.g., safety, side effects, contraindications)
Pricing negotiation or requests for discounts
More than 2 consecutive questions the AI cannot answer from the SOP
Explicit request to speak to a human, manager, or supervisor
Mention of adverse reactions, allergic reactions, or emergencies
escalation_rules.escalation_response: I understand this is important to you. Let me connect you with a member of our team who can best help you with this. A team member will be with you shortly.
escalation_rules.escalation_channels: The query will be routed to the next available human agent via the internal dashboard.

faqs.question: What are your Botox prices?
faqs.answer: Our Botox (anti-wrinkle injection) treatments start from £200. The final price depends on the number of areas treated. We'll provide a personalised quote during your free consultation.

faqs.question: How do I book an appointment?
faqs.answer: You can book via WhatsApp by messaging us at +44 20 7123 4567, or online through our website at www.bloomaesthetics.co.uk/book.

faqs.question: What are your opening hours?
faqs.answer: We're open Monday to Saturday, 9:00 AM to 7:00 PM. We're closed on Sundays and bank holidays.

faqs.question: Do I need a consultation first?
faqs.answer: Yes, a free initial consultation is required before any first-time treatment. This allows our practitioner to assess suitability and create a personalised treatment plan.

faqs.question: What is your cancellation policy?
faqs.answer: We require 24 hours' notice for cancellations or rescheduling. Late cancellations or no-shows may be subject to a £50 fee.

faqs.question: Do you offer payment plans or financing?
faqs.answer: Information about payment plans is not currently available in our records. Please contact our team directly for the most up-to-date information on financing options.

faqs.question: What payment methods do you accept?
faqs.answer: We accept cash, debit card, credit card, and bank transfer. Payment is due at the time of treatment.

faqs.question: Is there any downtime after Botox?
faqs.answer: Downtime after Botox is minimal. Most patients return to normal activities immediately. We recommend avoiding strenuous exercise, lying flat, or rubbing the treated area for 4 hours after treatment.

faqs.question: How long do fillers last?
faqs.answer: Dermal fillers typically last 6–12 months, depending on the area treated and the product used. Your practitioner will discuss expected longevity during your consultation.

faqs.question: What is the minimum age for treatment?
faqs.answer: All patients must be 18 years or older to receive treatment at Bloom Aesthetics Clinic.

tone_guidelines.register: Conversational but polished — avoid overly clinical or overly casual language
tone_guidelines.empathy: Always acknowledge the customer's concerns and goals before providing information
tone_guidelines.brevity: Keep responses concise and scannable — customers are often messaging on mobile
tone_guidelines.closing: End responses with a clear next step or call to action (e.g., booking a consultation)
